heading: Dispositions of certain life estates
label: 2519 Dispositions of certain life estates

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: For purposes of this chapter and chapter 11, any disposition of all or part of a qualifying income interest for life in any property to which this section applies shall be treated as a transfer of all interests in such property other than the qualifying income interest.

children.heading: Property to which this subsection applies
children.label: b Property to which this subsection applies

children.text: under section 2056 by reason of subsection (b)(7) thereof, or
under section 2523 by reason of subsection (f) thereof.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: c Cross reference
children.text: For right of recovery for gift tax in the case of property treated as transferred under this section, see section 2207A(b).
